view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for limited date availability is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of limited date availability by confirming that the community center gym is only available for rent on specific weekends, specifically Saturdays from 2pm to 10pm. The linked use case explicitly states this limitation, and the booking evidence shows that the event planner booked the space for a charity gala on a Saturday, which aligns with the stated availability. Therefore, the requirement is fully covered by the provided evidence.
